articles.author: Reuters
articles.title: South African protesters go door-to-door forcing immigrants from their homes - NBC News
articles.description: Groups of anti-immigration South Africans seized foreigners from their homes in Johannesburg on Thursday ​and handed them to police in a hardening of protests that have sown fear ‌in communities and strained ties with some countries.
